examples: Yet much of the land—moist black soil and extraordinary verdure—was all but empty.
Kay and Gerda took each other's hand: it was lovely spring weather, with abundance of flowers and of verdure.
The hills are covered with verdure.
And there is the poignant allure of "Ophelia, " sinking in her waterlogged gown amid meticulously rendered verdure.
The lord who preserves the manor lives a long way from the journeyman whose mother once dropped him near the verdure.
